selected_data_class: Selected admissible Einstein-matter Cauchy data with fixed gauge, regularity threshold, finite curvature-energy norm, and controlled boundary flux.
estimate_shape: QL_gate(data; S) <= C * E_grav(data) + Flux_boundary(data; S)
proof_obligation: Prove the coercive estimate for every selected admissible datum data and admissible quasi-local surface S, with an explicit constant C under the fixed gauge, regularity, energy, and boundary-flux hypotheses.
